zh.lifeSummary: 當Ecuyer Jean de Roye於1340年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆洛也時，他的父親seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye11歲，母親Jeanne de Cherisy9歲。他於1375年10月3日與Dame Jeanne de Bethune結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年9月25日在保加利亞享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ecuyer Jean de Roye于1340年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆洛也时，他的父亲seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye11岁，母亲Jeanne de Cherisy9岁。他于1375年10月3日与Dame Jeanne de Bethune结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年9月25日在保加利亚享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: Turks defeat Serbs at Kosovo Polje. Exposes the remaining Bulgarian territory to Ottoman occupation.

en.lifeSummary: When Ecuyer Jean de Roye was born in 1340, in Roye, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye, was 11 and his mother, Jeanne de Cherisy, was 9. He married Dame Jeanne de Bethune on 3 October 1375. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 25 September 1396, in Bulgaria, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ecuyer Jean de Roye est né en 1340, à Roye, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Cherisy, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Dame Jeanne de Bethune le 3 octobre 1375. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1396, à Bulgarie, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ecuyer Jean de Roye 1340 in Roye, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye 11 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Cherisy 9. Er hat am 3. Oktober 1375 Dame Jeanne de Bethune geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. September 1396 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bulgarien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ecuyer Jean de Roye è nato il nel 1340 nel Roye, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Cherisy, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Dame Jeanne de Bethune il 3 ottobre 1375. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 settembre 1396, nel Bulgaria, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ecuyer Jean de Royeが1340年にフランスピカーディソンメロイで生まれた時，父seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Royeは11歳，母Jeanne de Cherisyは9歳であった。1375年10月3日にDame Jeanne de Bethuneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年9月25日にブルガリアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ecuyer Jean de Roye(이)가 1340년 프랑스 피카디 솜 로예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Cherisy(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1375년 10월 3일 Dame Jeanne de Bethune(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 9월 25일 불가리아에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ecuyer Jean de Roye nasceu em 1340, em Roye, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Cherisy, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Jeanne de Bethune em 3 de outubro de 1375. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1396, em Bulgária, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ecuyer Jean de Roye родился в 1340 г. в местности рои, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Cherisy, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Jeanne de Bethune 3 октября 1375 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 сентября 1396 г. в местности Болгария в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ecuyer Jean de Roye nació en 1340, en Roye, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Cherisy, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Dame Jeanne de Bethune el 3 de octubre de 1375. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1396, en Bulgaria, a la edad de 56 años.
